overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a neon-lit urban plaza at night, ascending through a narrow alleyway, and emerging onto a rooftop terrace with panoramic daytime city views. The clip features a dramatic transition from artificial neon lighting to natural daylight with ray-traced reflections and futuristic cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit pedestrian plaza with outdoor bar seating

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a cyberpunk plaza past outdoor seating and a central tree

entered.detail: illuminated signage for 'BREWS' hanging above the plaza entrance
large glowing screen displaying a stylized face advertisement
mature tree with thick trunk in a concrete planter surrounded by benches
long wooden bar counter with neon lighting and green stools
bright green illuminated stools lined along the bar counter

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a neon-lit urban plaza at night, featuring a large central tree surrounded by benches, an outdoor bar with glowing green stools on the right, and bright digital billboards. The player walks forward through the semi-covered pedestrian area with scattered trash and cyberpunk aesthetic details.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley between buildings with graffiti-covered glass

events.description: moves from open plaza into narrow passage between tall buildings
looks up toward bright sky visible through narrow gap between buildings

agents.ego_description: entering a narrow alleyway and looking up at the sky visible between building walls

entered.detail: tall glass windows covered in red and cyan neon graffiti tags
tight concrete walls of the service passage creating a narrow corridor
massive industrial ventilation fan spinning slowly on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The player transitions from the open plaza into a narrow service alley with graffiti-covered glass walls on the right. The space becomes increasingly enclosed until the camera looks upward, revealing a sliver of bright sky between the towering buildings and a large industrial ventilation fan.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop terrace with lounge furniture and city overlook

events.description: emerges from narrow passage onto open rooftop terrace
dramatic transition from dark alley to bright daylight with golden hour lighting

agents.ego_description: climbing up to the rooftop and approaching an outdoor lounge area with umbrella seating

entered.detail: large patio umbrella with table and chairs on the rooftop terrace
wooden lounge chairs arranged around the rooftop umbrella
multi-level highway overpass structure with vehicles visible in distance
panoramic view of futuristic skyscrapers and high-rise buildings

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the narrow passage onto a sunlit rooftop terrace furnished with lounge chairs and a large umbrella. The lighting shifts dramatically from neon night to bright golden hour daylight, revealing a stunning view of the futuristic city skyline and elevated highways.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-rise rooftop overlook with panoramic city views

events.description: camera pans right to reveal more of the city skyline and elevated highway infrastructure

agents.ego_description: standing on the rooftop edge observing the sprawling cyberpunk cityscape and distant skyscrapers

entered.detail: massive holographic advertisement displaying a woman's face with blue eye makeup
tall corporate skyscraper with the Arasaka logo visible near the top

segments.scene_description: The final segment showcases a breathtaking panoramic view of the cyberpunk city from the rooftop. A massive holographic billboard dominates the left side while the iconic Arasaka building rises in the center. The camera pans across the skyline, revealing the complex network of elevated highways and futuristic architecture bathed in warm daylight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-drenched urban plaza at night into the blinding daylight of a high-altitude rooftop. It begins by moving through a semi-covered pedestrian area filled with digital billboards, glowing green bar stools, and a central tree. As the camera leaves the open plaza, the environment tightens into a narrow service alley with graffiti-covered glass walls, eventually tilting upward toward a sliver of bright sky and an industrial ventilation fan. The scene then opens abruptly onto a sunlit rooftop terrace with lounge chairs, where the lighting shifts dramatically from artificial neon to the warm gold of the golden hour. Finally, the camera pans across a breathtaking panoramic skyline, revealing the massive Arasaka building and a network of elevated highways beneath a dominant holographic billboard.
